twitter_thread: I tested 25 summer gadgets and found 18 were pointless. Only 7 made the cut.
Anker PowerCore's 20,000mAh battery life can charge your phone 5 times.
Mistbox's misting tech lowered my AC bill by $45 last month.
Don't waste money on 2-star gadgets like the $25 cooling towel that's just a wet rag.
Energizer's LED lantern lit my backyard for 12 hours on a single set of batteries.
The Jackery solar charger powered my fridge for 8 hours during a blackout.
What's the most effective gadget you've used to stay cool this summer? #heatrelief #gadgets
pack.linkedin: After testing 25 summer gadgets, I found that only 7 were worth the investment. The Anker PowerCore, for example, can charge your phone 5 times with its 20,000mAh battery life. Mistbox's misting tech lowered my AC bill by $45 last month. When shopping for gadgets, avoid items with low Amazon ratings and opt for reliable choices like Energizer's LED lantern or the Jackery solar charger. What's been your go-to gadget for staying cool this summer?

Stay cool without getting ripped off
pack.reddit_headline: Exposing the Worst Summer Gadget Rip-Offs: What's the Biggest Waste of Money?
